languages.text: "Я передам ваше решение экипажу. Обратитесь ко мне на мостике, если все же захотите благословить шествие своим вниманием".
"I will inform the crew of your decision. Should you wish to bless the procession with your attention after all, please speak to me on the bridge."
languages.original_text: "Я передам ваше решение экипажу. Обратитесь ко мне на мостике, если все же захотите благословить шествие своим вниманием".

traits.locale_text: "I will inform the crew of your decision. Speak to me on the bridge should you wish to bless the procession with your attention."
"I will inform the crew of your decision. Speak to me on the bridge should you wish to bless the procession with your attention."
"I will inform the crew of your decision. Speak to me on the bridge should you wish to bless the procession with your attention."
"I will inform the crew of your decision. Speak to me on the bridge should you wish to bless the procession with your attention."
"I will inform the crew of your decision. Should you wish to bless the procession with your attention after all, please speak to me on the bridge."

languages.text: "Ich werde die Crew über Eure Entscheidung informieren. Bitte sprecht mich auf der Brücke an, falls Ihr der Prozession Eure Aufmerksamkeit widmen wollt."
languages.original_text: "I will inform the crew of your decision. Should you wish to bless the procession with your attention after all, please speak to me on the bridge."

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde die Crew über Eure Entscheidung informieren. Bitte sprecht mich auf der Brücke an, falls Ihr der Prozession Eure Aufmerksamkeit widmen wollt."

languages.text: « Je ferai part de votre décision à l'équipage. Venez me parler sur la passerelle si vous souhaitez malgré tout bénir la procession de votre présence. »
languages.original_text: "I will inform the crew of your decision. Should you wish to bless the procession with your attention after all, please speak to me on the bridge."

traits.locale_text: « Je ferai part de votre décision à l'équipage. Venez me parler sur la passerelle si vous souhaitez malgré tout bénir la procession de votre présence. »

languages.text: “我会将您的决定告知船员们。如果您愿意赏光，亲眼见证游行仪式，请到舰桥找我。”
languages.original_text: "I will inform the crew of your decision. Should you wish to bless the procession with your attention after all, please speak to me on the bridge."

traits.locale_text: “我会将您的决定告知船员们。如果您愿意赏光，亲眼见证游行仪式，请到舰桥找我。”

languages.text: «Informaré a la tripulación de su decisión. Si, después de todo, decide honrar la procesión con su presencia, puede informarme de ello en el puente».
languages.original_text: "I will inform the crew of your decision. Should you wish to bless the procession with your attention after all, please speak to me on the bridge."

traits.locale_text: «Informaré a la tripulación de su decisión. Si, después de todo, decide honrar la procesión con su presencia, puede informarme de ello en el puente».

languages.text: 「あなたの決断をクルーに伝えます。それでも行列を祝福したいのなら、ブリッジで私に言ってくれ。」
languages.original_text: "I will inform the crew of your decision. Should you wish to bless the procession with your attention after all, please speak to me on the bridge."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたの決断をクルーに伝えます。それでも行列を祝福したいのなら、ブリッジで私に言ってくれ。」

languages.text: "Kararınızı mürettebata bildireceğim. Eğer varlığınızla töreni bizzat onurlandırmak isterseniz lütfen köprüde benimle konuşun."
languages.original_text: "I will inform the crew of your decision. Should you wish to bless the procession with your attention after all, please speak to me on the bridge."

traits.locale_text: "Kararınızı mürettebata bildireceğim. Eğer varlığınızla töreni bizzat onurlandırmak isterseniz lütfen köprüde benimle konuşun."
